You're in — your Small Space Reset Kit is ready.

Thank you so much. Check your email for your download link — it should arrive within a few minutes. If you don't see it, check your spam folder.

📦

Download the Reset Kit

Click the button below to download your kit. The same link has been sent to your email so you'll always have it.

Download Your Kit (PDF)

A download link has also been sent to your email.

Check your inbox

A confirmation email with your download link is on its way. It comes from Organize with Mary — add it to your contacts so future emails don't end up in spam.

Over the next few days, I'll also send you a few tips on how to get the most out of the kit — starting with which room to tackle first.

One more thing

Want a room-by-room reset plan?

The Reset Kit takes you further — 10 worksheets, a 7-day schedule, and a measurement tracker so you know exactly what to buy. $17, instant download.

See the Reset Kit — $17

One-time payment · Digital download · No tools needed
